query:
ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS acceptance_status ENUM('pending', 'accepted', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending';
ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rejection_reason TEXT;
